title: How I Built 272 Web Spiders for ScholarHub
description: The architecture behind scraping 12,000+ scholarships daily from 272 sources using 7 different scraping methods — including Cloudflare bypass and auto-healing pipelines.

title: 7x Query Performance: Database Normalization in Practice
description: How redesigning a student management database to 3NF with Singleton connection pooling dropped query latency from 50ms to 7ms.

title: Building RAG Pipelines That Actually Work
description: Lessons from production — choosing between Pinecone and ChromaDB, optimizing embedding quality, and building evaluation pipelines that catch retrieval failures.
